zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid van Voorne於大約1119年出生在荷蘭霍蘭奧斯特賀內時，她的父親Hugo III van Voorne12歲，母親Hadewich van Holland10歲。她於大約1149年與Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1199年享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid van Voorne于大约1119年出生在荷兰霍蘭奧斯特賀內时，她的父亲Hugo III van Voorne12岁，母亲Hadewich van Holland10岁。她于大约1149年与Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1199年享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid van Voorne was born about 1119, in Oostvoorne, Holland, Netherlands, her father, Hugo III van Voorne, was 12 and her mother, Hadewich van Holland, was 10. She married Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede about 1149. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1199, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid van Voorne est née environ 1119, à Oostvoorne, Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Hugo III van Voorne, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Hadewich van Holland, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede environ 1149. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1199, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid van Voorne um 1119 in Oostvoorne, Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugo III van Voorne 12 und ihre Mutter Hadewich van Holland 10. Sie hat um 1149 Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1199 im Alter von 81 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid van Voorne è nata il circa 1119 nel Oostvoorne, Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Hugo III van Voorne, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Hadewich van Holland, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede circa 1149. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1199, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid van Voorneが約1119年にオランダホーランドオオストボオルンで生まれた時，父Hugo III van Voorneは12歳，母Hadewich van Hollandは10歳であった。約1149年にDaniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwedeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1199年に81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid van Voorne(이)가 대략 1119년 네덜란드 홀랜드 스트보른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugo III van Voorne(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hadewich van Holland(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 대략 1149년 Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1199년 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Kaatsheuvel, Noord-Brabant, Netherlands: Kaatsheuvel, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid van Voorne nasceu aproximadamente 1119, em Oostvoorne, Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hugo III van Voorne, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Hadewich van Holland, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede aproximadamente 1149. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1199, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid van Voorne родилась около 1119 г. в местности уствурн, холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Hugo III van Voorne было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Hadewich van Holland, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede около 1149 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1199 г. в возрасте 81 год.

es.Kaatsheuvel, Noord-Brabant, Netherlands: Kaatsheuvel, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid van Voorne nació aproximadamente 1119, en Oostvoorne, Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Hugo III van Voorne, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Hadewich van Holland, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Daniël I van Muijlwijk van der Merwede aproximadamente 1149. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1199, a la edad de 81 años.
